policy.existingQuestionSetId: existing Firestore document questionSetId must not change during upload
policy.newQuestionId: new source-derived questions must use sourceUniqueKey-derived deterministic document IDs and not collide with local existing Firestore IDs
policy.questionId: existing Firestore-derived originalQuestionId must upload to one of its existing firestoreQuestionIds
policy.questionSetId: upload questions must have a non-empty questionSetId
policy.sourceConflictStatus: included needs_source_review rows fail unless upload policy preserves existing Firestore content/IDs or adds site-shadow docs without existing-ID collision
